{{Infobox group
| name = Golden Sword School
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Golden Sword School]] is a school that may have craftsmen capable of making parasite rings.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Golden Sword School]] is a group [[Lindon]] needs to visit.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Golden Sword School]] is located on the mountain to the west.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
